name: Cranberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, 1/4 cup sugar, baking soda, and salt into a bowl.
2. In a small bowl, combine the egg, butter/sour milk (buttermilk), and oil; blend well.
3. Add all at once to the dry ingredients, stirring just enough to moisten.
4. Combine the cranberries and 1/2 cup sugar in another bowl.
5. Stir this mixture into the batter.
6. Spoon the batter into greased muffin cups (2 1/2-inch size), filling them about 2/3 full.
7. Bake at 400 degrees F for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Serve hot with butter and homemade jelly or jam.
